'''Jaddyyk moss''' was a dangerous, [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] that was native to the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. It grew in stalks and mounds on the floor of the [[Well of the Dead]], giving an appearance of a long-furred Wookiee.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{Mo}}
